stories.title: Sinner Wins Wimbledon 6-7, 7-6, 6-3, 6-4 — Back-to-Back Champion, Fifth Grand Slam Title

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Jannik Sinner is a back-to-back Wimbledon champion.

6-7, 7-6, 6-3, 6-4 over Zverev. Five Grand Slam titles. 10th man ever to defend Wimbledon.

He came from a set down. He never looked back. #Wimbledon #ATP #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Sinner won 80% of first-serve points. He was down a set. He won the second-set tiebreak 7-2 and never relinquished it.

Zverev had 17 aces and an 80% first-serve percentage — and still lost by four sets.

That's how complete Sinner is right now. #Wimbledon #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Sinner Defeats Zverev to Win Back-to-Back Wimbledon Titles — His Fifth Grand Slam

stories.title: Djokovic Won't Retire Yet — "I Want to Come Back to Wimbledon One More Time"

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Djokovic after Wimbledon: "I want to come back here at least one more time."

He's not retiring. He's targeting the US Open. At 39, he says reaching two Slam semis/finals in 2026 "would be a very good result for 99% of players."

He's not done. #Wimbledon #ATP #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Djokovic on Sinner after their Wimbledon SF: "He was just a level or more better."

That's the clearest, most honest thing Djokovic has said about another player in years.

Sinner is at a different level right now. #Wimbledon #ATP #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Djokovic Won't Retire Yet — "I Want to Come Back to Wimbledon One More Time"

stories.title: Finals Day Round-Up — Patten/Heliövaara Win Men's Doubles; Cruz Hewitt Runner-Up in Boys'

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Henry Patten wins Wimbledon men's doubles with Heliövaara — and becomes the first British player to win it TWICE in the Open Era.

Cruz Hewitt (son of Lleyton) was a boys' final runner-up, 23 years after his dad won the men's title.

What a fortnight. #Wimbledon #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Wimbledon 2026 Finals Day: Patten Wins Men's Doubles Again; Cruz Hewitt Reaches Boys' Final

stories.title: Wimbledon 2026 by the Numbers — Records, Storylines, Champions

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Wimbledon 2026 by the numbers:

— Sinner: 100 Grand Slam wins (5 titles, 24yo)
— Djokovic: 108 Wimbledon wins (passes Federer)
— Noskova: 10th straight different women's champ
— Fery: first British wildcard in Open Era SF

Quite a fortnight. #Wimbledon #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Wimbledon 2026 by the Numbers — Records, Storylines, and Every Champion

stories.title: Post-Wimbledon: ATP Clay Season Opens Monday — Bastad, Gstaad, Umag All Begin This Week

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Wimbledon is done. The ATP heads straight to clay.

Bastad, Gstaad and Umag all start Monday — three ATP 250s in the same week. WTA opens in Iasi.

The summer clay swing leading to the hard-court season begins now. #ATP #WTA #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Post-Wimbledon: The ATP Turns to Clay — Bastad, Gstaad, and Umag All Begin Monday
